mapper.sql: rule_id, tenant_id, rule_name, rule_version, effective_at, delivery_rule, non_response_rule, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, status, registered_by_account_id, registered_by_user_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_decision_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND effective_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ORDER BY effective_at DESC, rule_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM t_repair_decision_rule WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, effective_at DESC, rule_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_repair_decision_rule SET status = 'SUPERSEDED', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_decision_rule ( tenant_id, rule_name, rule_version, effective_at, delivery_rule, non_response_rule, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, status, registered_by_account_id, registered_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleVersion}, #{effectiveAt}, #{deliveryRule}, #{nonResponseRule}, #{objectKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{etag}, #{sha256}, #{status}, #{registeredByAccountId}, #{registeredByUserId} )
